expect: Falsification lane rate is 2% vs 20% target. Expect to find: (1) structural cause in open_lane.py or dispatch, (2) >=80% of lanes are exploration/resolution mode, (3) no enforcement mechanism for falsification quota.
actual: Falsification rate 1/90 = 1.1% (vs 20% target). Root cause: open_lane.py line 409-420 only hard-blocks at exactly 0 falsification lanes. When rate is 1-19%, it prints WARN but does not exit — L-601 advisory decay. Fix: changed to hard-block at <20%, keeping --skip-falsification-check override. Mode distribution: objective 28.9%, exploration 22.2%, hardening 12.2%, resolution 11.1%, verification 10.0%, historian 6.7%, assumption 4.4%, replication 3.3%, falsification 1.1%.
diff: Expectations confirmed: (1) structural cause found in open_lane.py, (2) 98.9% of lanes are non-falsification, (3) enforcement existed but was advisory-only for >0% case. Unexpected: the --skip-falsification-check flag was never used (0 occurrences in SWARM-LANES.md) — sessions bypassed the check by having >=1 falsification lane in the 20-session window.
